title: Hitachi India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Hitachi India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Hitachi India are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Allahabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Hitachi India:
Hitachi India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hitachi India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
